codeReview.summary: The fix commit resolves four of the five prior blocking findings (adopt container-id validation, stop error propagation, model-info null serialization, and compose-before-docker ordering), and introduces unique integration-test ports. However, one blocking integration assertion remains hardcoded to the old port and now contradicts the updated test configuration.

issues.description: test_integration_vllm_orphan_adoption now builds config with port 19879 (line 2616) but still asserts adopted_info.port == 19876. With ROOKERY_INTEGRATION=1 this test will fail deterministically, so the integration test fix is incomplete.
Integration helper still pins docker_image to floating tag vllm/vllm-openai:latest, which can reduce long-term reproducibility of integration test outcomes.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, prior failed reviews, skill, and commit 21f1d1a. Four previously blocking issues are fixed in implementation, but a stale hardcoded port assertion leaves one blocking failure path in env-enabled integration tests, so this fix review remains fail.
